content.fact_text: HealthMonitorService implemented with circuit-breaker protected connectivity checks for PG, Redis, and Kafka, alongside Prometheus-based metrics instrumentation.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides real-time infrastructure health status and metrics observability via registered endpoints. Automatically tracks event loop lag and exposes Prometheus metrics.
provenance_data.utility: Provides standardized health and observability instrumentation for the Catalog/Inventory services, ensuring production reliability and visibility.
